instruction: Building a coffee cup step by step (step 3 of 6). So far you've drawn: saucer, cup-body. Add the next part: circle (cx=88, cy=80, r=10, fill none, stroke #222, stroke-width 3) with id "handle".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <ellipse id="saucer" fill="#cccccc" cx="64" cy="104" rx="40" ry="6" />
  <rect id="cup-body" fill="#f5f5f5" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="36" y="56" width="48" height="48" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <ellipse id="saucer" fill="#cccccc" cx="64" cy="104" rx="40" ry="6" />
  <rect id="cup-body" fill="#f5f5f5" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="36" y="56" width="48" height="48" />
  <circle id="handle" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" cx="88" cy="80" r="10" />
</svg>
